title: Edward Weevil and Miss Bakkin
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on edward weevil and miss bakkin within the Weevil, the Barto Club, and the Road to Zou storyline.
scene: The Straw Hats rely on Bartolomeo's chaotic crew while the wider world introduces Weevil and pushes the voyage toward Zou.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: regard- less of his lineage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There is the one unshakable truth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He is overwhelmingly powerful ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His strength is reminiscent of the "mere" strength of Whitebeard in his youth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fools... They're all fools...they'll never under- stand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: say it together, all at once...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Bakkin
dialogue.text: The only sons of "Whitebeard" are the "Whitebeard Pirates"!!

dialogue.speaker: Edward Weevil
dialogue.text: Right, Momma?? Momma??

dialogue.speaker: Edward Weevil
dialogue.text: I'm "Whitebeard's" son right? I gotta be, I mean my beer is white!!!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Bakkin
dialogue.text: Yes it is, Cupcake! These so called Whitebeard Pirates are were merely playing house!! They're nothing more than pretenders....!!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Bakkin
dialogue.text: The only true son of the once "strongest pirate in the world" Whitebeard... and the only one actually related to him by blood is you and only you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And I am...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The woman who stole "White- beard's" heart!!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Bakkin
dialogue.text: weeble's mother self-proclaimed "Whitebeard's beloved" miss bakkin*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Get it together, my little "treasure"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Take a gander!

dialogue.speaker: Edward Weevil
dialogue.text: Ehhh? A mirror?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No, this is a picture of "Whitebeard"!

dialogue.speaker: Edward Weevil
dialogue.text: Oww that HURSS, MOMMA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Edward Weevil
dialogue.text: OHH... I could'a schworn it was a mirror!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you see the resemblance?? There's no denying that you're father and son, right?! My foolish little boy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ahhhh Mommma, im sorryy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... I would never hold it against you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Because I love you!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: MOOOM- MMAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then, we're off!!! Let me hear what it is our next assignment is?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Errr... Ummmm~ I forgotten.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Bakkin
dialogue.text: We're going off to search for the stragglers of the Whitebeard Pirates, starting with the "Phoenix Marco"!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we'll put him out of his misery!!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Bakkin
dialogue.text: Your father, newgate, should have left behind a "vast inheritance" for you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As his one true heir, you are its lone, rightful beneficiary!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: SQUAW

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Huuee... I get it... I think...

dialogue.speaker: Edward Weevil
dialogue.text: against the man who killed Poppa, "Blackbeard" ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: But what abouts my one true grudge...

summary: Edward Weevil and Miss Bakkin: The Straw Hats struggle aboard Bartolomeo's ship while Edward Weevil and Miss Bakkin enter the story, and the crew follows the Vivre Card toward Zou.
